query:
UPDATE feeds
        SET title = COALESCE($1, title),
            site_url = COALESCE($2, site_url),
            etag = COALESCE($3, etag),
            last_modified = COALESCE($4, last_modified),
            last_checked_at = $5,
            last_success_at = $5,
            failure_count = 0
        WHERE id = $6
